name: Veltuzumab
description: Veltuzumab is a monoclonal antibody which is being investigated for the treatment of non-Hodgkin's lymphoma. As of October 2009, it is undergoing Phase I/II clinical trials.

interactions.name: Belimumab
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Veltuzumab is combined with Belimumab.

interactions.name: Varicella Zoster Vaccine (Live/Attenuated)
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Varicella Zoster Vaccine (Live/Attenuated) can be decreased when used in combination with Veltuzumab.

interactions.name: Yellow fever vaccine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Yellow fever vaccine can be decreased when used in combination with Veltuzumab.
